drafts.body:
Hi Eli,

Thanks for confirming — and apologies, it looks like this got stuck in our queue and Friday, July 17 at 2:00 PM Central has already passed without us confirming on our end.

We'd still love to get the demo on the calendar for you and Dana. Could you send over a couple of times that work for you next week? Once we hear back, I'll get it scheduled with our team (including Dana Lopez) right away.

Thanks for your patience,
Sales Team
